# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: AWS CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer).
Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
  
  MySubnet1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
  
  MySubnet2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:<｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1b
      CidrBlock: '10.0.2.0/24'
  
  MyS3Bucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: mys3bucket
  
  MyRDSInstance:
    Type: 'AWS::RDS::DBInstance'
    Properties:
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.micro
      Engine: mysql
      AllocatedStorage: '50'
      DBName: mydatabase
      MasterUsername: masteruser
      MasterUserPassword: password123
  
  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Instance'
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: ami-0c9485512cf5aad6b # Ubuntu Server 18.04 LTS
      SubnetId: !Ref MySubnet1
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - sg-03e7fd31f58ebd3bc # Existing Security Group for SSH, HTTP traffic
  
  MyLoadBalancer:
    Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer'
    Properties:
      Subnets:
        - !Ref MySubnet1
        - !Ref MySubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - sg-03e7fd31f58ebd3bc # Existing Security Group for HTTP traffic
      Scheme: internet-facing
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyLoadBalancer
  
  MyTargetGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      Targets:
        - Id: !GetAtt MyEC2Instance.PrivateIp
  
  ListenerRule:
    Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::ListenerRule'
    Properties:
      Actions:
        - Type: forward
          ForwardConfig:
            Targets:
              - TargetGroupArn: !Ref MyTargetGroup
                Weight: 100
      Conditions:
        - Field: host-header
          HostHeaderConfig:
            Values:
              - mywebsite.com
      ListenerArn: arn:aws:elasticloadbalancing:us-east-1:<AccountNumber>:listener/app/myLoadBalancer/50dc6c7928f1a143
Outputs:
  LoadBalancerDNSName:
    Description: The DNS name of the load balancer
    Value: !GetAtt MyLoadBalancer.DNSName
